data.title: Swarm Aero opens advanced manufacturing center in Northwest Arkansas.
data.description: Swarm Aero revealed the establishment of an Advanced Manufacturing Center in Oxnard, California. The company recently held a ribbon-cutting ceremony to celebrate this new facility located in Northwest Arkansas.

data.title: TitleLab™ by Energy Domain cuts title work time from weeks to days with its patent-pending courthouse intelligence product.
data.description: Energy Domain has recently unveiled TitleLab™, a new courthouse intelligence product on their Energy Domain Data platform. This patent-pending tool is designed to streamline the process of creating run sheets and title chains, tasks that typically require weeks of manual work from landman and legal teams. With TitleLab, these tasks can now be completed in just hours or days, saving valuable time and resources. This automation will greatly benefit land teams who spend a significant amount of time gathering courthouse records, purchasing abstracts, and constructing title chains.

data.title: AI-referred traffic converts 3-6 times higher, as per 2026 research by Erlin.ai over PR Newswire. Media contact info updated.
data.description: New studies conducted by Erlin.ai have revealed that website traffic referred by artificial intelligence (AI) results in conversion rates that are 3 to 6 times higher. The findings of this research were released in a news report on February 18, 2026. As per the company representative, the media contact details have been refreshed. The updated information includes the name and phone number for inquiries.

data.title: Eric Trump remains optimistic on Bitcoin, reiterates $1 million target despite 28% pullback.
data.description: Even though Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a 28% decline in the past month, Eric Trump expressed strong optimism about the leading cryptocurrency. In an interview with CNBC, Trump stated that he is "extremely bullish" on Bitcoin and the overall crypto market, maintaining his $1 million price target. Despite the recent drop, Trump highlighted Bitcoin's impressive long-term performance, citing its growth from $16,000 two years ago to approximately $70,000. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AV, Inc. to present at Citizens Technology Conference in San Francisco. CFO Kevin McDonnell to speak live on March 2 at 6:30pm ET. Webcast link: https://event.summitcast.com/view/T4CQTTCBJdGa9nQQkYN
data.description: Arlington-based company AeroVironment, Inc. (AV) has announced their participation in the upcoming Citizens Technology Conference in San Francisco, California. AV's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Kevin McDonnell, is set to engage in a fireside chat on March 2 at 6:30 p.m. ET, 5:30 p.m. CT, and 3:30 p.m. PT. The chat will be broadcast live at the specified times and will also be available for later viewing on AV's website at the following link: https://event.summitcast.com/view/T4CQTTCBJdGa9nQQkYN. AV is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AVAV.

data.title: United Airlines receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating technical improvement. Key threshold reached. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: United Airlines has seen an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a notable improvement in technical performance. The airline has hit a key threshold as a result. This update is significant for investors analyzing the company's standing in the market.

data.title: Fourteen American students chosen for CIEE internship program in Dublin; Tenth Cohort for summer 2026.
data.description: Fourteen exceptional college students from the United States have been chosen to participate in a prestigious summer internship program in Dublin. The Council on International Educational Exchange (CIEE) recently revealed the 2026 Frederick Douglass-Daniel O'Connell program that aims to provide a transformative experience for the selected students. This initiative offers a unique opportunity for these high-achieving individuals to gain valuable insights and skills in an international setting.

data.title: Sprott Inc. sets Q4 '25 dividend at US$0.40 per share, payable on March 17 to shareholders of record on March 2.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Sprott Inc. declared a dividend for the fourth quarter of 2025. The dividend amounts to US$0.40 per common share and will be paid on March 17, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business day on March 2, 2026. Sprott Inc., listed on NYSE/TSX under the ticker symbol SII, made this announcement.

data.title: Pediatrix Medical Group to announce quarterly earnings on 2026-02-19; analysts predict EPS of $0.52. Investors await update.
data.description: Pediatrix Medical Group (traded on NYSE under the symbol MD) will be announcing its quarterly earnings on February 19, 2026. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.52 for the company. Shareholders are anticipating the announcement, with hopes of exceeding these projections and receiving optimistic guidance for the following quarter. It is crucial for potential investors to remember that stock prices are significantly impacted by future outlooks rather than solely relying on historical performance. Keep in mind that the company's past EPS performance will also play a role in shaping perceptions.

data.title: Five9 set to release earnings report on Feb 19, analysts predict EPS of $0.60. Previous EPS beat caused 7.89% share drop.
data.description: Five9 (FIVN) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on February 19, 2026. Analysts expect the company to report an EPS of $0.60. The upcoming announcement has generated anticipation among investors, who are eager to see if the company surpasses expectations and provides positive guidance for the next quarter. It is important for new investors to note that while earnings performance is crucial, market reactions are often influenced by guidance. In the previous quarter, Five9 outperformed expectations with an EPS beat of $0.26, resulting in a 7.89% decrease in share price the following day. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
